title: External ID Ledger
description: Shape of ledger/external_ids.json — minted once, keyed by source_id (or canonical entity id for resolved/merged entities). Holds the stable external_id and, once harvested post-load, the Everspot internal id. This anchoring (source_id → external_id) is what makes loads idempotent. See 01-operating-model.md §2 and plan §3 stage 9.

entries.description: Map keyed by source_id ("<table>:<key>") or canonical id ("canonical:<entity>:<n>" for merged entities spanning multiple source rows) → mint record.

external_id.description: The minted external id (format src:<entity-abbrev>:<source-key>). Permanent.

everspot_id.description: Everspot internal id, harvested after load (via external-ids export/Orion read). Null until loaded.

minted_at.description: When the external_id was first minted (never changes across drops).

source_ids.description: For merged/entity-resolved records, the constituent source_ids collapsed into this canonical id.
